questions.text:

andpresidentialsystems ofgovermment?

choices.B: Since enacting laws is easier in a presidential system of goverment government is better than parliamentary system.
choices.C: In a parliamentary system since the Prime Mister is the head of the executive and the member of the legislative branch, it weakens the possibility of checks and balances.
